title: T-035 — UI: TEC-081 Item Deactivate modal
prompt: Build TEC-081 deactivate modal per §6A. Reason picker (Discontinued / Recipe Change / D365 Mismatch / Other), notes textarea (required when reason='Other'), target_status select (deprecated/blocked). On confirm calls POST /deactivate (T-011). Match prototype `archive_product_modal` prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:138-163. RED tests/ui/tec-081-deactivate.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-081-deactivate.test.tsx`. Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.

pipeline_inputs.description: Item deactivate confirmation modal with required reason and target status.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use shadcn Dialog. Confirm button disabled until reason selected. When reason='Other', notes field becomes required (validation on submit).
acceptance_criteria: Given the modal opens, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:138-163, then it shows the same 4 reason options, the same target_status select, and the same Cancel/Confirm button order — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given reason='Other' selected and notes empty, when Confirm clicked, then validation error displayed.
Given Confirm clicked with valid input, when POST /deactivate returns 200, then modal closes and parent table refreshes.

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED tests for reason validation + parity.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow confirm without a reason.

Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
